descFull: A full-stack, peer-to-peer coinflip betting casino game on Solana. Players connect a wallet, create or join on-chain game rooms, and compete head-to-head for 2× the stake. The UI updates in real time over WebSockets, outcomes are resolved on-chain with Orao VRF, and the backend tracks rooms, chat, and match history in MongoDB.
